title: できれば静かに見ててほしい

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(It's always so relaxing to come here and watch
the stars alone...)

text_block_list.name: Man
text_block_list.text:
Is this that hidden spot that went viral?! There's
so many people. The power of the internet is
scary.

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, babe, this is soooo romantic! C'mon,
tell me how my eyes sparkle like the stars!
Pleeeease?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd's commotion completely ruins Admire
Vega's night.
